title: Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
company: Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited:
Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited!
